---
title: Extensions test
author: Yuki Izumi
version: 0.1
date: '2016-08-31'
license: '[CC-BY-SA 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)'
...

## Tables

Here's a well-formed table, doing everything it should.

```````````````````````````````` example
| abc | def |
| --- | --- |
| ghi | jkl |
| mno | pqr |
.
Document scope=1:1..4:13 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..4:13 alignments=[none,none] children=3
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:13 isHeader=true children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:6 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:5 literal="abc" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:8..1:12 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:9..1:11 literal="def" children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:13 isHeader=false children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:6 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:5 literal="ghi" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=3:8..3:12 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=3:9..3:11 literal="jkl" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=4:1..4:13 isHeader=false children=2
        ├── TableCell scope=4:2..4:6 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=4:3..4:5 literal="mno" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=4:8..4:12 children=1
            └── Text scope=4:9..4:11 literal="pqr" children=0
````````````````````````````````

We're going to mix up the table now; we'll demonstrate that inline formatting
works fine, but block elements don't.  You can also have empty cells, and the
textual alignment of the columns is shown to be irrelevant.

```````````````````````````````` example
Hello!

| _abc_ | セン |
| ----- | ---- |
| 1. Block elements inside cells don't work. | |
| But _**inline elements do**_. | x |

Hi!
.
Document scope=1:1..8:3 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:6 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:6 literal="Hello!" children=0
├── Table scope=3:1..6:37 alignments=[none,none] children=3
│   ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:18 isHeader=true children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:8 children=1
│   │   │   └── Emphasis scope=3:3..3:7 children=1
│   │   │       └── Text scope=3:4..3:6 literal="abc" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=3:10..3:17 children=1
│   │       └── Text scope=3:11..3:16 literal="セン" children=0
│   ├── TableRow scope=5:1..5:48 isHeader=false children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=5:2..5:45 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=5:3..5:44 literal="1. Block elements inside cells don't work." children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=5:47..5:47 children=0
│   └── TableRow scope=6:1..6:37 isHeader=false children=2
│       ├── TableCell scope=6:2..6:32 children=3
│       │   ├── Text scope=6:3..6:6 literal="But " children=0
│       │   ├── Emphasis scope=6:7..6:30 children=1
│       │   │   └── Strong scope=6:8..6:29 children=1
│       │   │       └── Text scope=6:10..6:27 literal="inline elements do" children=0
│       │   └── Text scope=6:31..6:31 literal="." children=0
│       └── TableCell scope=6:34..6:36 children=1
│           └── Text scope=6:35..6:35 literal="x" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=8:1..8:3 children=1
    └── Text scope=8:1..8:3 literal="Hi!" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Here we demonstrate some edge cases about what is and isn't a table.

```````````````````````````````` example
| Not enough table | to be considered table |

| Not enough table | to be considered table |
| Not enough table | to be considered table |

| Just enough table | to be considered table |
| ----------------- | ---------------------- |

| ---- | --- |

|x|
|-|

| xyz |
| --- |
.
Document scope=1:1..15:7 children=6
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:45 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:45 literal="| Not enough table | to be considered table |" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..4:45 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=3:1..3:45 literal="| Not enough table | to be considered table |" children=0
│   ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   └── Text scope=4:1..4:45 literal="| Not enough table | to be considered table |" children=0
├── Table scope=6:1..7:46 alignments=[none,none] children=1
│   └── TableRow scope=6:1..6:46 isHeader=true children=2
│       ├── TableCell scope=6:2..6:20 children=1
│       │   └── Text scope=6:3..6:19 literal="Just enough table" children=0
│       └── TableCell scope=6:22..6:45 children=1
│           └── Text scope=6:23..6:44 literal="to be considered table" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=9:1..9:14 children=1
│   └── Text scope=9:1..9:14 literal="| ---- | --- |" children=0
├── Table scope=11:1..12:3 alignments=[none] children=1
│   └── TableRow scope=11:1..11:3 isHeader=true children=1
│       └── TableCell scope=11:2..11:2 children=1
│           └── Text scope=11:2..11:2 literal="x" children=0
└── Table scope=14:1..15:7 alignments=[none] children=1
    └── TableRow scope=14:1..14:7 isHeader=true children=1
        └── TableCell scope=14:2..14:6 children=1
            └── Text scope=14:3..14:5 literal="xyz" children=0
````````````````````````````````

A "simpler" table, GFM style:

```````````````````````````````` example
abc | def
--- | ---
xyz | ghi
.
Document scope=1:1..3:9 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:9 alignments=[none,none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:9 isHeader=true children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:1..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:1..1:3 literal="abc" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:6..1:9 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:7..1:9 literal="def" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:9 isHeader=false children=2
        ├── TableCell scope=3:1..3:4 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=3:1..3:3 literal="xyz" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=3:6..3:9 children=1
            └── Text scope=3:7..3:9 literal="ghi" children=0
````````````````````````````````

We are making the parser slighly more lax here. Here is a table with spaces at
the end:

```````````````````````````````` example
Hello!

| _abc_ | セン |
| ----- | ---- |
| this row has a space at the end | | 
| But _**inline elements do**_. | x |

Hi!
.
Document scope=1:1..8:3 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:6 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:6 literal="Hello!" children=0
├── Table scope=3:1..6:37 alignments=[none,none] children=3
│   ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:18 isHeader=true children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:8 children=1
│   │   │   └── Emphasis scope=3:3..3:7 children=1
│   │   │       └── Text scope=3:4..3:6 literal="abc" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=3:10..3:17 children=1
│   │       └── Text scope=3:11..3:16 literal="セン" children=0
│   ├── TableRow scope=5:1..5:38 isHeader=false children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=5:2..5:34 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=5:3..5:33 literal="this row has a space at the end" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=5:36..5:36 children=0
│   └── TableRow scope=6:1..6:37 isHeader=false children=2
│       ├── TableCell scope=6:2..6:32 children=3
│       │   ├── Text scope=6:3..6:6 literal="But " children=0
│       │   ├── Emphasis scope=6:7..6:30 children=1
│       │   │   └── Strong scope=6:8..6:29 children=1
│       │   │       └── Text scope=6:10..6:27 literal="inline elements do" children=0
│       │   └── Text scope=6:31..6:31 literal="." children=0
│       └── TableCell scope=6:34..6:36 children=1
│           └── Text scope=6:35..6:35 literal="x" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=8:1..8:3 children=1
    └── Text scope=8:1..8:3 literal="Hi!" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Table alignment:

```````````````````````````````` example
aaa | bbb | ccc | ddd | eee
:-- | --- | :-: | --- | --:
fff | ggg | hhh | iii | jjj
.
Document scope=1:1..3:27 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:27 alignments=[left,none,center,none,right] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:27 isHeader=true children=5
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:1..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:1..1:3 literal="aaa" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:6..1:10 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:7..1:9 literal="bbb" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:12..1:16 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:13..1:15 literal="ccc" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:18..1:22 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:19..1:21 literal="ddd" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:24..1:27 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:25..1:27 literal="eee" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:27 isHeader=false children=5
        ├── TableCell scope=3:1..3:4 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=3:1..3:3 literal="fff" children=0
        ├── TableCell scope=3:6..3:10 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=3:7..3:9 literal="ggg" children=0
        ├── TableCell scope=3:12..3:16 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=3:13..3:15 literal="hhh" children=0
        ├── TableCell scope=3:18..3:22 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=3:19..3:21 literal="iii" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=3:24..3:27 children=1
            └── Text scope=3:25..3:27 literal="jjj" children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Table cell count mismatches

The header and delimiter row must match.

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b | c |
| --- | --- |
| this | isn't | okay |
.
Document scope=1:1..3:23 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..3:23 children=5
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:13 literal="| a | b | c |" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── Text scope=2:1..2:13 literal="| --- | --- |" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Text scope=3:1..3:23 literal="| this | isn't | okay |" children=0
````````````````````````````````

But any of the body rows can be shorter. Rows longer
than the header are truncated.

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b | c |
| --- | --- | ---
| x
| a | b
| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 |
.
Document scope=1:1..5:21 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..5:21 alignments=[none,none,none] children=4
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:13 isHeader=true children=3
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:6..1:8 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal="b" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:10..1:12 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:11..1:11 literal="c" children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:3 isHeader=false children=3
    │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:3 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:3 literal="x" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=3:0..3:0 children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=3:0..3:0 children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=4:1..4:7 isHeader=false children=3
    │   ├── TableCell scope=4:2..4:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=4:3..4:3 literal="a" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=4:6..4:7 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=4:7..4:7 literal="b" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=4:0..4:0 children=0
    └── TableRow scope=5:1..5:21 isHeader=false children=3
        ├── TableCell scope=5:2..5:4 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=5:3..5:3 literal="1" children=0
        ├── TableCell scope=5:6..5:8 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=5:7..5:7 literal="2" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=5:10..5:12 children=1
            └── Text scope=5:11..5:11 literal="3" children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Embedded pipes

Tables with embedded pipes could be tricky.

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b |
| --- | --- |
| Escaped pipes are \|okay\|. | Like \| this. |
| Within `\|code\| is okay` too. |
| _**`c\|`**_ \| complex
| don't **\_reparse\_**
.
Document scope=1:1..6:23 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..6:23 alignments=[none,none] children=5
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:9 isHeader=true children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:6..1:8 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal="b" children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:47 isHeader=false children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:30 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:27 literal="Escaped pipes are |okay|." children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=3:32..3:46 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=3:33..3:44 literal="Like | this." children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=4:1..4:34 isHeader=false children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=4:2..4:33 children=3
    │   │   ├── Text scope=4:3..4:9 literal="Within " children=0
    │   │   ├── Code scope=4:11..4:24 mode=embedded literal="|code| is okay" children=0
    │   │   └── Text scope=4:26..4:30 literal=" too." children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=4:0..4:0 children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=5:1..5:24 isHeader=false children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=5:2..5:24 children=2
    │   │   ├── Emphasis scope=5:3..5:12 children=1
    │   │   │   └── Strong scope=5:4..5:11 children=1
    │   │   │       └── Code scope=5:7..5:8 mode=embedded literal="c|" children=0
    │   │   └── Text scope=5:13..5:22 literal=" | complex" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=5:0..5:0 children=0
    └── TableRow scope=6:1..6:23 isHeader=false children=2
        ├── TableCell scope=6:2..6:23 children=2
        │   ├── Text scope=6:3..6:8 literal="don't " children=0
        │   └── Strong scope=6:9..6:23 children=1
        │       └── Text scope=6:11..6:21 literal="_reparse_" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=6:0..6:0 children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Oddly-formatted markers

This shouldn't assert.

```````````````````````````````` example
| a |
--- |
.
Document scope=1:1..2:5 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..2:5 alignments=[none] children=1
    └── TableRow scope=1:1..1:5 isHeader=true children=1
        └── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
            └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Escaping

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b |
| --- | --- |
| \\ | `\\` |
| \\\\ | `\\\\` |
| \_ | `\_` |
| \| | `\|` |
| \a | `\a` |

\\ `\\`

\\\\ `\\\\`

\_ `\_`

\| `\|`

\a `\a`
.
Document scope=1:1..17:7 children=6
├── Table scope=1:1..7:13 alignments=[none,none] children=6
│   ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:9 isHeader=true children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=1:6..1:8 children=1
│   │       └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal="b" children=0
│   ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:13 isHeader=false children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:5 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:4 literal="\\" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=3:7..3:12 children=1
│   │       └── Code scope=3:9..3:10 mode=embedded literal="\\\\" children=0
│   ├── TableRow scope=4:1..4:17 isHeader=false children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=4:2..4:7 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=4:3..4:6 literal="\\\\" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=4:9..4:16 children=1
│   │       └── Code scope=4:11..4:14 mode=embedded literal="\\\\\\\\" children=0
│   ├── TableRow scope=5:1..5:13 isHeader=false children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=5:2..5:5 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=5:3..5:4 literal="_" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=5:7..5:12 children=1
│   │       └── Code scope=5:9..5:10 mode=embedded literal="\\_" children=0
│   ├── TableRow scope=6:1..6:13 isHeader=false children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=6:2..6:5 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=6:3..6:3 literal="|" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=6:7..6:12 children=1
│   │       └── Code scope=6:9..6:9 mode=embedded literal="|" children=0
│   └── TableRow scope=7:1..7:13 isHeader=false children=2
│       ├── TableCell scope=7:2..7:5 children=1
│       │   └── Text scope=7:3..7:4 literal="\\a" children=0
│       └── TableCell scope=7:7..7:12 children=1
│           └── Code scope=7:9..7:10 mode=embedded literal="\\a" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=9:1..9:7 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=9:1..9:3 literal="\\ " children=0
│   └── Code scope=9:5..9:6 mode=embedded literal="\\\\" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=11:1..11:11 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=11:1..11:5 literal="\\\\ " children=0
│   └── Code scope=11:7..11:10 mode=embedded literal="\\\\\\\\" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=13:1..13:7 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=13:1..13:3 literal="_ " children=0
│   └── Code scope=13:5..13:6 mode=embedded literal="\\_" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=15:1..15:7 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=15:1..15:3 literal="| " children=0
│   └── Code scope=15:5..15:6 mode=embedded literal="\\|" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=17:1..17:7 children=2
    ├── Text scope=17:1..17:3 literal="\\a " children=0
    └── Code scope=17:5..17:6 mode=embedded literal="\\a" children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Embedded HTML

```````````````````````````````` example
| a |
| --- |
| <strong>hello</strong> |
| ok <br> sure |
.
Document scope=1:1..4:16 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..4:16 alignments=[none] children=3
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:5 isHeader=true children=1
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
    ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:26 isHeader=false children=1
    │   └── TableCell scope=3:2..3:25 children=3
    │       ├── HTML scope=3:3..3:10 literal="<strong>" children=0
    │       ├── Text scope=3:11..3:15 literal="hello" children=0
    │       └── HTML scope=3:16..3:24 literal="</strong>" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=4:1..4:16 isHeader=false children=1
        └── TableCell scope=4:2..4:15 children=3
            ├── Text scope=4:3..4:5 literal="ok " children=0
            ├── HTML scope=4:6..4:9 literal="<br>" children=0
            └── Text scope=4:10..4:14 literal=" sure" children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Reference-style links

```````````````````````````````` example
Here's a link to [Freedom Planet 2][].

| Here's a link to [Freedom Planet 2][] in a table header. |
| --- |
| Here's a link to [Freedom Planet 2][] in a table row. |

[Freedom Planet 2]: http://www.freedomplanet2.com/
.
Document scope=1:1..7:50 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:38 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:17 literal="Here's a link to " children=0
│   ├── Link scope=1:18..1:37 destination="http://www.freedomplanet2.com/" title="" children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=1:19..1:34 literal="Freedom Planet 2" children=0
│   └── Text scope=1:38..1:38 literal="." children=0
└── Table scope=3:1..5:57 alignments=[none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:60 isHeader=true children=1
    │   └── TableCell scope=3:2..3:59 children=3
    │       ├── Text scope=3:3..3:19 literal="Here's a link to " children=0
    │       ├── Link scope=3:20..3:39 destination="http://www.freedomplanet2.com/" title="" children=1
    │       │   └── Text scope=3:21..3:36 literal="Freedom Planet 2" children=0
    │       └── Text scope=3:40..3:58 literal=" in a table header." children=0
    └── TableRow scope=5:1..5:57 isHeader=false children=1
        └── TableCell scope=5:2..5:56 children=3
            ├── Text scope=5:3..5:19 literal="Here's a link to " children=0
            ├── Link scope=5:20..5:39 destination="http://www.freedomplanet2.com/" title="" children=1
            │   └── Text scope=5:21..5:36 literal="Freedom Planet 2" children=0
            └── Text scope=5:40..5:55 literal=" in a table row." children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Sequential cells

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b | c |
| --- | --- | --- |
| d || e |
.
Document scope=1:1..3:10 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:10 alignments=[none,none,none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:13 isHeader=true children=3
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:6..1:8 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal="b" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:10..1:12 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:11..1:11 literal="c" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:10 isHeader=false children=3
        ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:4 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:3 literal="d" children=0
        ├── TableCell scope=3:6..3:5 children=0
        └── TableCell scope=3:7..3:9 children=1
            └── Text scope=3:8..3:8 literal="e" children=0
````````````````````````````````

### Interaction with emphasis

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b |
| --- | --- |
|***(a)***|
.
Document scope=1:1..3:11 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:11 alignments=[none,none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:9 isHeader=true children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:6..1:8 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal="b" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:11 isHeader=false children=2
        ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:10 children=1
        │   └── Emphasis scope=3:2..3:10 children=1
        │       └── Strong scope=3:2..3:10 children=1
        │           └── Text scope=3:5..3:7 literal="(a)" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=3:0..3:0 children=0
````````````````````````````````

### a table can be recognised when separated from a paragraph of text without an empty line

```````````````````````````````` example
123
456
| a | b |
| ---| --- |
d | e
.
Document scope=1:1..5:5 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=0:0..0:0 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:2 literal="123" children=0
│   ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   └── Text scope=1:0..1:2 literal="456" children=0
└── Table scope=1:1..5:5 alignments=[none,none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:17 isHeader=true children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:10..1:12 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:11..1:11 literal="a" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:14..1:16 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:15..1:15 literal="b" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=5:1..5:5 isHeader=false children=2
        ├── TableCell scope=5:1..5:2 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=5:1..5:1 literal="d" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=5:4..5:5 children=1
            └── Text scope=5:5..5:5 literal="e" children=0
````````````````````````````````

## Strikethroughs

A well-formed strikethrough.

```````````````````````````````` example
A proper ~strikethrough~.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:25 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:25 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:9 literal="A proper " children=0
    ├── Strikethrough scope=1:10..1:24 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=1:11..1:23 literal="strikethrough" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:25..1:25 literal="." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Some strikethrough edge cases.

```````````````````````````````` example
These are ~not strikethroughs.

No, they are not~

This ~is ~ legit~ isn't ~ legit.

This is not ~~~~~one~~~~~ huge strikethrough.

~one~ ~~two~~ ~~~three~~~

No ~mismatch~~
.
Document scope=1:1..11:14 children=6
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:30 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:30 literal="These are ~not strikethroughs." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:17 children=1
│   └── Text scope=3:1..3:0 literal="No, they are not~" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=5:1..5:32 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=5:1..5:5 literal="This " children=0
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=5:6..5:17 children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=5:7..5:16 literal="is ~ legit" children=0
│   └── Text scope=5:18..5:32 literal=" isn't ~ legit." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=7:1..7:45 children=1
│   └── Text scope=7:1..7:45 literal="This is not ~~~~~one~~~~~ huge strikethrough." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=9:1..9:25 children=4
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=9:1..9:5 children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=9:2..9:4 literal="one" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=9:6..9:6 literal=" " children=0
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=9:7..9:13 children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=9:9..9:11 literal="two" children=0
│   └── Text scope=9:14..9:0 literal=" ~~~three~~~" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=11:1..11:14 children=1
    └── Text scope=11:1..11:0 literal="No ~mismatch~~" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Using 200 tilde since it overflows the internal buffer
size (100) for parsing delimiters in inlines.c
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~striked~

## Autolinks

```````````````````````````````` example
: http://google.com https://google.com

<http://google.com/å> http://google.com/å

scyther@pokemon.com

scy.the_rbe-edr+ill@pokemon.com

scyther@pokemon.com.

scyther@pokemon.com/

scyther@pokemon.com/beedrill@pokemon.com

mailto:scyther@pokemon.com

This is a mailto:scyther@pokemon.com

mailto:scyther@pokemon.com.

mmmmailto:scyther@pokemon.com

mailto:scyther@pokemon.com/

mailto:scyther@pokemon.com/message

mailto:scyther@pokemon.com/mailto:beedrill@pokemon.com

xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com

xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com.

xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com/message

xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com/message.

Email me at:scyther@pokemon.com

www.github.com www.github.com/á

www.google.com/a_b

Underscores not allowed in host name www.xxx.yyy._zzz

Underscores not allowed in host name www.xxx._yyy.zzz

Underscores allowed in domain name www._xxx.yyy.zzz

**Autolink and http://inlines**

![http://inline.com/image](http://inline.com/image)

a.w@b.c

Full stop outside parens shouldn't be included http://google.com/ok.

(Full stop inside parens shouldn't be included http://google.com/ok.)

"http://google.com"

'http://google.com'

http://🍄.ga/ http://x🍄.ga/
.
Document scope=1:1..63:32 children=32
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:38 children=4
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:2 literal=": " children=0
│   ├── Link scope=1:3..1:19 destination="http://google.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:19 literal="http://google.com" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:20..1:20 literal=" " children=0
│   └── Link scope=1:21..1:38 destination="https://google.com" title=null children=1
│       └── Text scope=1:21..1:38 literal="https://google.com" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:43 children=3
│   ├── Link scope=3:1..3:22 destination="http://google.com/å" title="" children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=3:2..3:21 literal="http://google.com/å" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=3:23..3:23 literal=" " children=0
│   └── Link scope=3:24..3:43 destination="http://google.com/å" title=null children=1
│       └── Text scope=3:24..3:43 literal="http://google.com/å" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=5:1..5:19 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=5:1..5:19 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=5:1..5:19 literal="scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=7:1..7:31 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=7:1..7:31 destination="mailto:scy.the_rbe-edr+ill@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=7:1..7:31 literal="scy.the_rbe-edr+ill@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=9:1..9:20 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=9:1..9:19 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=9:1..9:19 literal="scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=9:20..9:20 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=11:1..11:20 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=11:1..11:19 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=11:1..11:19 literal="scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=11:20..11:20 literal="/" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=13:1..13:40 children=5
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=13:1..13:19 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=13:1..13:19 literal="scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=13:20..13:20 literal="/" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=13:21..13:40 destination="mailto:beedrill@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=13:21..13:40 literal="beedrill@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=15:1..15:26 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=15:1..15:26 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=15:1..15:26 literal="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=17:1..17:36 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=17:1..17:10 literal="This is a " children=0
│   ├── Link scope=17:11..17:36 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=17:11..17:36 literal="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=19:1..19:27 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=19:1..19:26 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=19:1..19:26 literal="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=19:27..19:27 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=21:1..21:29 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=21:1..21:10 literal="mmmmailto:" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=21:11..21:29 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=21:11..21:29 literal="scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0

│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0

│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0

│   │   └── Text scope=25:1..25:26 literal="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=25:27..25:34 literal="/message" children=0

│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0

│   │   └── Text scope=33:1..33:32 literal="xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com/message" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0

│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=35:1..35:32 destination="xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com/message" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=35:1..35:32 literal="xmpp:scyther@pokemon.com/message" children=0
│   └── Text scope=35:33..35:33 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=37:1..37:31 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=37:1..37:12 literal="Email me at:" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=37:13..37:31 destination="mailto:scyther@pokemon.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=37:13..37:31 literal="scyther@pokemon.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=39:1..39:32 children=3
│   ├── Link scope=39:1..39:14 destination="http://www.github.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=39:1..39:14 literal="www.github.com" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=39:15..39:15 literal=" " children=0
│   └── Link scope=39:16..39:32 destination="http://www.github.com/á" title=null children=1
│       └── Text scope=39:16..39:32 literal="www.github.com/á" children=0

│   └── Link scope=41:1..41:18 destination="http://www.google.com/a_b" title=null children=1
│       └── Text scope=41:1..41:18 literal="www.google.com/a_b" children=0

│   ├── Text scope=47:1..47:35 literal="Underscores allowed in domain name " children=0
│   └── Link scope=47:36..47:51 destination="http://www._xxx.yyy.zzz" title=null children=1
│       └── Text scope=47:36..47:51 literal="www._xxx.yyy.zzz" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=49:1..49:31 children=1
│   └── Strong scope=49:1..49:31 children=2
│       ├── Text scope=49:3..49:15 literal="Autolink and " children=0
│       └── Link scope=49:16..49:29 destination="http://inlines" title=null children=1
│           └── Text scope=49:16..49:29 literal="http://inlines" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=51:1..51:51 children=1
│   └── Image scope=51:1..51:51 source="http://inline.com/image" title=null children=1
│       └── Text scope=51:3..51:25 literal="http://inline.com/image" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=53:1..53:7 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=53:1..53:7 destination="mailto:a.w@b.c" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=53:1..53:7 literal="a.w@b.c" children=0
│   └── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=55:1..55:68 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=55:1..55:47 literal="Full stop outside parens shouldn't be included " children=0
│   ├── Link scope=55:48..55:67 destination="http://google.com/ok" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=55:48..55:67 literal="http://google.com/ok" children=0
│   └── Text scope=55:68..55:68 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=57:1..57:69 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=57:1..57:47 literal="(Full stop inside parens shouldn't be included " children=0
│   ├── Link scope=57:48..57:67 destination="http://google.com/ok" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=57:48..57:67 literal="http://google.com/ok" children=0
│   └── Text scope=57:68..57:69 literal=".)" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=59:1..59:19 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=59:1..59:0 literal="\"" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=59:2..59:18 destination="http://google.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=59:2..59:18 literal="http://google.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=59:19..59:19 literal="\"" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=61:1..61:19 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=61:1..61:0 literal="'" children=0
│   ├── Link scope=61:2..61:18 destination="http://google.com" title=null children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=61:2..61:18 literal="http://google.com" children=0
│   └── Text scope=61:19..61:19 literal="'" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=63:1..63:32 children=4
    ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
    ├── Link scope=63:1..63:15 destination="http://🍄.ga/" title=null children=1
    │   └── Text scope=63:1..63:15 literal="http://🍄.ga/" children=0
    ├── Text scope=63:16..63:16 literal=" " children=0
    └── Link scope=63:17..63:32 destination="http://x🍄.ga/" title=null children=1
        └── Text scope=63:17..63:32 literal="http://x🍄.ga/" children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
This shouldn't crash everything: (_A_@_.A
.
Document scope=1:1..1:41 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:41 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:34 literal="This shouldn't crash everything: (" children=0
    ├── Emphasis scope=1:35..1:37 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=1:36..1:36 literal="A" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:38..1:41 literal="@_.A" children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
These should not link:

* @a.b.c@. x
* n@.  b
.
Document scope=1:1..4:8 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:22 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:22 literal="These should not link:" children=0
└── List scope=3:1..4:8 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
    ├── ListItem scope=3:1..3:12 checked=null children=1
    │   └── Paragraph scope=3:3..3:12 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=3:3..3:12 literal="@a.b.c@. x" children=0
    └── ListItem scope=4:1..4:8 checked=null children=1
        └── Paragraph scope=4:3..4:8 children=1
            └── Text scope=4:3..4:8 literal="n@.  b" children=0
````````````````````````````````

## HTML tag filter


```````````````````````````````` example
This is <xmp> not okay, but **this** <strong>is</strong>.

<p>This is <xmp> not okay, but **this** <strong>is</strong>.</p>

Nope, I won't have <textarea>.

<p>No <textarea> here either.</p>

<p>This <random /> <thing> is okay</thing> though.</p>

Yep, <totally>okay</totally>.

<!-- HTML comments are okay, though. -->
<!- But we're strict. ->
<! No nonsense. >
<!-- Leave multiline comments the heck alone, though, okay?
Even with {"x":"y"} or 1 > 2 or whatever. Even **markdown**.
-->
<!--- Support everything CommonMark's parser does. -->
<!---->
<!--thistoo-->
.
Document scope=1:1..21:14 children=12
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:57 children=9
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:8 literal="This is " children=0
│   ├── HTML scope=1:9..1:13 literal="<xmp>" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:14..1:28 literal=" not okay, but " children=0
│   ├── Strong scope=1:29..1:36 children=1
│   │   └── Text scope=1:31..1:34 literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:37..1:37 literal=" " children=0
│   ├── HTML scope=1:38..1:45 literal="<strong>" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:46..1:47 literal="is" children=0
│   ├── HTML scope=1:48..1:56 literal="</strong>" children=0
│   └── Text scope=1:57..1:57 literal="." children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=3:1..3:64 literal="<p>This is <xmp> not okay, but **this** <strong>is</strong>.</p>\n" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=5:1..5:30 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=5:1..5:19 literal="Nope, I won't have " children=0
│   ├── HTML scope=5:20..5:29 literal="<textarea>" children=0
│   └── Text scope=5:30..5:30 literal="." children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=7:1..7:33 literal="<p>No <textarea> here either.</p>\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=9:1..9:54 literal="<p>This <random /> <thing> is okay</thing> though.</p>\n" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=11:1..11:29 children=5
│   ├── Text scope=11:1..11:5 literal="Yep, " children=0
│   ├── HTML scope=11:6..11:14 literal="<totally>" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=11:15..11:18 literal="okay" children=0
│   ├── HTML scope=11:19..11:28 literal="</totally>" children=0
│   └── Text scope=11:29..11:29 literal="." children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=13:1..12:0 literal="<!-- HTML comments are okay, though. -->\n" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=14:1..15:17 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=14:1..14:24 literal="<!- But we're strict. ->" children=0
│   ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   └── Text scope=15:1..15:17 literal="<! No nonsense. >" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=16:1..17:60 literal="<!-- Leave multiline comments the heck alone, though, okay?\nEven with {\"x\":\"y\"} or 1 > 2 or whatever. Even **markdown**.\n-->\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=19:1..18:3 literal="<!--- Support everything CommonMark's parser does. -->\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=20:1..19:54 literal="<!---->\n" children=0
└── HTMLBlock scope=21:1..20:7 literal="<!--thistoo-->\n" children=0
````````````````````````````````

## Footnotes

```````````````````````````````` example
This is some text![^1]. Other text.[^footnote].

Here's a thing[^other-note].

And another thing[^codeblock-note].

This doesn't have a referent[^nope].


[^other-note]:       no code block here (spaces are stripped away)

[^codeblock-note]:
        this is now a code block (8 spaces indentation)

[^1]: Some *bolded* footnote definition.

Hi!

[^footnote]:
    > Blockquotes can be in a footnote.

        as well as code blocks

    or, naturally, simple paragraphs.

[^unused]: This is unused.
.
Document scope=1:1..26:26 children=10
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:47 children=5
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:18 literal="This is some text!" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=1:19..1:22 id="1" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:23..1:35 literal=". Other text." children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=1:36..1:46 id="footnote" children=0
│   └── Text scope=1:47..1:47 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:28 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=3:1..3:14 literal="Here's a thing" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=3:15..3:27 id="other-note" children=0
│   └── Text scope=3:28..3:28 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=5:1..5:35 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=5:1..5:17 literal="And another thing" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=5:18..5:34 id="codeblock-note" children=0
│   └── Text scope=5:35..5:35 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=7:1..7:36 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=7:1..7:28 literal="This doesn't have a referent" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=7:29..7:35 id="nope" children=0
│   └── Text scope=7:36..7:36 literal="." children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=10:22..11:0 id="other-note" children=1
│   └── Paragraph scope=10:22..10:66 children=1
│       └── Text scope=10:22..10:66 literal="no code block here (spaces are stripped away)" children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=12:19..14:0 id="codeblock-note" children=1
│   └── CodeBlock scope=13:9..14:0 mode=standalone info=null language=null literal="this is now a code block (8 spaces indentation)\n" fenced=false closed=true children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=15:7..16:0 id="1" children=1
│   └── Paragraph scope=15:7..15:40 children=3
│       ├── Text scope=15:7..15:11 literal="Some " children=0
│       ├── Emphasis scope=15:12..15:19 children=1
│       │   └── Text scope=15:13..15:18 literal="bolded" children=0
│       └── Text scope=15:20..15:40 literal=" footnote definition." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=17:1..17:3 children=1
│   └── Text scope=17:1..17:3 literal="Hi!" children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=19:13..25:0 id="footnote" children=3
│   ├── BlockQuote scope=20:5..20:39 children=1
│   │   └── Paragraph scope=20:7..20:39 children=1
│   │       └── Text scope=20:7..20:39 literal="Blockquotes can be in a footnote." children=0
│   ├── CodeBlock scope=22:9..23:0 mode=standalone info=null language=null literal="as well as code blocks\n" fenced=false closed=true children=0
│   └── Paragraph scope=24:5..24:37 children=1
│       └── Text scope=24:5..24:37 literal="or, naturally, simple paragraphs." children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=26:12..26:26 id="unused" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=26:12..26:26 children=1
        └── Text scope=26:12..26:26 literal="This is unused." children=0
````````````````````````````````

## When a footnote is used multiple times, we insert multiple backrefs.

```````````````````````````````` example
This is some text. It has a footnote[^a-footnote].

This footnote is referenced[^a-footnote] multiple times, in lots of different places.[^a-footnote]

[^a-footnote]: This footnote definition should have three backrefs.
.
Document scope=1:1..5:67 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:50 children=3
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:36 literal="This is some text. It has a footnote" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=1:37..1:49 id="a-footnote" children=0
│   └── Text scope=1:50..1:50 literal="." children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:98 children=4
│   ├── Text scope=3:1..3:27 literal="This footnote is referenced" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=3:28..3:40 id="a-footnote" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=3:41..3:85 literal=" multiple times, in lots of different places." children=0
│   └── FootnoteReference scope=3:86..3:98 id="a-footnote" children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=5:16..5:67 id="a-footnote" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=5:16..5:67 children=1
        └── Text scope=5:16..5:67 literal="This footnote definition should have three backrefs." children=0
````````````````````````````````

## Footnote reference labels are href escaped

```````````````````````````````` example
Hello[^"><script>alert(1)</script>]

[^"><script>alert(1)</script>]: pwned
.
Document scope=1:1..3:37 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:35 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="Hello" children=0
│   └── FootnoteReference scope=1:6..1:35 id="\"><script>alert(1)</script>" children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=3:33..3:37 id="\"><script>alert(1)</script>" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=3:33..3:37 children=1
        └── Text scope=3:33..3:37 literal="pwned" children=0
````````````````````````````````

## Interop

Autolink and strikethrough.

```````````````````````````````` example
~~www.google.com~~

~~http://google.com~~
.
Document scope=1:1..3:21 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:18 children=1
│   └── Strikethrough scope=1:1..1:18 children=1
│       └── Link scope=1:3..1:16 destination="http://www.google.com" title=null children=1
│           └── Text scope=1:3..1:16 literal="www.google.com" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:21 children=1
    └── Strikethrough scope=3:1..3:21 children=2
        ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
        └── Link scope=3:3..3:19 destination="http://google.com" title=null children=1
            └── Text scope=3:3..3:19 literal="http://google.com" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Autolink and tables.

```````````````````````````````` example
| a | b |
| --- | --- |
| https://github.com www.github.com | http://pokemon.com |
.
Document scope=1:1..3:58 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:58 alignments=[none,none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:9 isHeader=true children=2
    │   ├── TableCell scope=1:2..1:4 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=1:3..1:3 literal="a" children=0
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:6..1:8 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal="b" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:58 isHeader=false children=2
        ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:36 children=4
        │   ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
        │   ├── Link scope=3:3..3:20 destination="https://github.com" title=null children=1
        │   │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:20 literal="https://github.com" children=0
        │   ├── Text scope=3:21..3:21 literal=" " children=0
        │   └── Link scope=3:22..3:35 destination="http://www.github.com" title=null children=1
        │       └── Text scope=3:22..3:35 literal="www.github.com" children=0
        └── TableCell scope=3:38..3:57 children=2
            ├── Text scope=0:0..0:0 literal="" children=0
            └── Link scope=3:39..3:56 destination="http://pokemon.com" title=null children=1
                └── Text scope=3:39..3:56 literal="http://pokemon.com" children=0
````````````````````````````````

## Task lists

```````````````````````````````` example
- [ ] foo
- [x] bar
.
Document scope=1:1..2:9 children=1
└── List scope=1:1..2:9 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
    ├── ListItem scope=1:1..1:9 checked=false children=1
    │   └── Paragraph scope=1:7..1:9 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:7..1:9 literal="foo" children=0
    └── ListItem scope=2:1..2:9 checked=true children=1
        └── Paragraph scope=2:7..2:9 children=1
            └── Text scope=2:7..2:9 literal="bar" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Show that a task list and a regular list get processed the same in
the way that sublists are created. If something works in a list
item, then it should work the same way with a task.  The only
difference should be the tasklist marker. So, if we use something
other than a space or x, it won't be recognized as a task item, and
so will be treated as a regular item.

```````````````````````````````` example
- [x] foo
  - [ ] bar
  - [x] baz
- [ ] bim

Show a regular (non task) list to show that it has the same structure
- [@] foo
  - [@] bar
  - [@] baz
- [@] bim
.
Document scope=1:1..10:9 children=3
├── List scope=1:1..5:0 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
│   ├── ListItem scope=1:1..3:11 checked=true children=2
│   │   ├── Paragraph scope=1:7..1:9 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=1:7..1:9 literal="foo" children=0
│   │   └── List scope=2:3..3:11 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
│   │       ├── ListItem scope=2:3..2:11 checked=false children=1
│   │       │   └── Paragraph scope=2:9..2:11 children=1
│   │       │       └── Text scope=2:9..2:11 literal="bar" children=0
│   │       └── ListItem scope=3:3..3:11 checked=true children=1
│   │           └── Paragraph scope=3:9..3:11 children=1
│   │               └── Text scope=3:9..3:11 literal="baz" children=0
│   └── ListItem scope=4:1..5:0 checked=false children=1
│       └── Paragraph scope=4:7..4:9 children=1
│           └── Text scope=4:7..4:9 literal="bim" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=6:1..6:69 children=1
│   └── Text scope=6:1..6:69 literal="Show a regular (non task) list to show that it has the same structure" children=0
└── List scope=7:1..10:9 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
    ├── ListItem scope=7:1..9:11 checked=null children=2
    │   ├── Paragraph scope=7:3..7:9 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=7:3..7:9 literal="[@] foo" children=0
    │   └── List scope=8:3..9:11 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
    │       ├── ListItem scope=8:3..8:11 checked=null children=1
    │       │   └── Paragraph scope=8:5..8:11 children=1
    │       │       └── Text scope=8:5..8:11 literal="[@] bar" children=0
    │       └── ListItem scope=9:3..9:11 checked=null children=1
    │           └── Paragraph scope=9:5..9:11 children=1
    │               └── Text scope=9:5..9:11 literal="[@] baz" children=0
    └── ListItem scope=10:1..10:9 checked=null children=1
        └── Paragraph scope=10:3..10:9 children=1
            └── Text scope=10:3..10:9 literal="[@] bim" children=0
````````````````````````````````
Use a larger indent -- a task list and a regular list should produce
the same structure.

```````````````````````````````` example
- [x] foo
    - [ ] bar
    - [x] baz
- [ ] bim

Show a regular (non task) list to show that it has the same structure
- [@] foo
    - [@] bar
    - [@] baz
- [@] bim
.
Document scope=1:1..10:9 children=3
├── List scope=1:1..5:0 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
│   ├── ListItem scope=1:1..3:13 checked=true children=2
│   │   ├── Paragraph scope=1:7..1:9 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=1:7..1:9 literal="foo" children=0
│   │   └── List scope=2:5..3:13 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
│   │       ├── ListItem scope=2:5..2:13 checked=false children=1
│   │       │   └── Paragraph scope=2:11..2:13 children=1
│   │       │       └── Text scope=2:11..2:13 literal="bar" children=0
│   │       └── ListItem scope=3:5..3:13 checked=true children=1
│   │           └── Paragraph scope=3:11..3:13 children=1
│   │               └── Text scope=3:11..3:13 literal="baz" children=0
│   └── ListItem scope=4:1..5:0 checked=false children=1
│       └── Paragraph scope=4:7..4:9 children=1
│           └── Text scope=4:7..4:9 literal="bim" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=6:1..6:69 children=1
│   └── Text scope=6:1..6:69 literal="Show a regular (non task) list to show that it has the same structure" children=0
└── List scope=7:1..10:9 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
    ├── ListItem scope=7:1..9:13 checked=null children=2
    │   ├── Paragraph scope=7:3..7:9 children=1
    │   │   └── Text scope=7:3..7:9 literal="[@] foo" children=0
    │   └── List scope=8:5..9:13 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=2
    │       ├── ListItem scope=8:5..8:13 checked=null children=1
    │       │   └── Paragraph scope=8:7..8:13 children=1
    │       │       └── Text scope=8:7..8:13 literal="[@] bar" children=0
    │       └── ListItem scope=9:5..9:13 checked=null children=1
    │           └── Paragraph scope=9:7..9:13 children=1
    │               └── Text scope=9:7..9:13 literal="[@] baz" children=0
    └── ListItem scope=10:1..10:9 checked=null children=1
        └── Paragraph scope=10:3..10:9 children=1
            └── Text scope=10:3..10:9 literal="[@] bim" children=0
````````````````````````````````
